message:
style(sync): minor clippy fixes for lifetime elision and Option checks

Mutex:
- Use anonymous lifetimes in Drop impl: Drop for LockFuture<'_, '_, T>

Pool:
- Use is_some_and() instead of map_or(false, ...)
- Drop state guard before returning Poll::Pending to release lock earlier

These are clippy-suggested improvements with no behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
